memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
Biography
According to the Visitation of Somerset[1] Johanna Combe was daughter of Johannis Combe, and married Johannes Toose , the son of Alexander Toose.


The will of her husband, John Tose of Taun …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Combes於大約1454年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Johannis Combes29歲，母親Johanna Maria Aben3歲。她和Sir Johannes Toose至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1502年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Combes于大约1454年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲Johannis Combes29岁，母亲Johanna Maria Aben3岁。她和Sir Johannes Toose至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1502年之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Combes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (also Combès): topographic name from combe ‘narrow valley, ravine’ (see Combe ), or a habitational name from any of various places in southern France, for example in Hérault, named Combes.

variants.name: Coombs
meanings: English (southern): variant of Coombe , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Combes was born about 1454, in Somerset, England, her father, Johannis Combes, was 29 and her mother, Johanna Maria Aben, was 3. She had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Sir Johannes Toose. She died after 1502, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Combes est née environ 1454, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Johannis Combes, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Johanna Maria Aben, avait 3 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Sir Johannes Toose. Elle est décédée après 1502, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Combes um 1454 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johannis Combes 29 und ihre Mutter Johanna Maria Aben 3. Sie hatte mit Sir Johannes Toose mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1502 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Combes è nata il circa 1454 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, Johannis Combes, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Johanna Maria Aben, aveva 3 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Sir Johannes Toose. Morì dopo il 1502, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Combesが約1454年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Johannis Combesは29歳，母Johanna Maria Abenは3歳であった。彼女はSir Johannes Tooseとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1502年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Combes(이)가 대략 1454년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johannis Combes(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Maria Aben(은)는 3세였다. 그녀는 Sir Johannes Toose(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Combes nasceu aproximadamente 1454, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Johannis Combes, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Maria Aben, tinha 3 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Sir Johannes Toose. Ela faleceu após 1502, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Combes родилась около 1454 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Johannis Combes было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Maria Aben, 3. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Sir Johannes Toose. Она умерла после 1502 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Combes nació aproximadamente 1454, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Johannis Combes, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Johanna Maria Aben, tenía 3 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con Sir Johannes Toose. Murió después de 1502, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
